Transmission Terminal

INITIATE RE-ROUTING REQUEST

READ BEFORE SUBMITTING DATA

  1. 1 Submissions must be sent as a single PDF link. No file attachments.
  2. 2 We do not publish digital-first work. Physical print intent is mandatory.
  3. 3 Unexpected samples sent to the Dublin Lab will be recycled without review.

Channel Info

LOCATION DUBLIN, IE
RESPONSE TIME 14 — 21 DAYS
FORMAT PDF LINK ONLY
COLD CALLS NOT ACCEPTED
